name: Linear MCP
description: Read and manage Linear issues, projects and cycles. List issues, create tickets, update status.

name: Stripe MCP
description: Query Stripe payments, customers, invoices and subscriptions. Create refunds and payment links.

name: Sentry MCP
description: Inspect Sentry errors, issues and performance traces. Search events and resolve issues.

name: Weather MCP
description: Public weather forecast and current conditions by city or coordinates. No credentials required.

name: Text Utilities MCP
description: Word count, reverse text, uppercase. A no-auth example skill for local autolearn demos (run services/mcp-servers/demo-utils/server.ts).
